faqs.question: What counts as a request?
faqs.answer: Each API call through OpenTracy counts as one request. Both successful and failed calls are counted.

faqs.question: Can I self-host OpenTracy?
faqs.answer: Yes. OpenTracy is open source (MIT). You can self-host the full stack with Docker. Starter and Enterprise plans add managed features on top.

faqs.question: Which providers are supported?
faqs.answer: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Mistral, Groq, AWS Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, Cohere, DeepSeek, Together AI, Fireworks, Ollama, and OpenRouter.

faqs.question: How does the free trial work?
faqs.answer: 14 days of Starter features, no credit card required. After the trial, you move to the Free plan automatically.

faqs.question: Is my data secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant. Enterprise plans include VPC deployment and BYOK encryption.

faqs.question: Can I switch plans anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Open source, open development. Build with us.

platform.title: The Complete LLM Operations Platform
platform.subtitle: Everything OpenTracy ships — from a unified model gateway to routing, tracing, evaluations, and distillation. Built for production teams with real architecture, measurable quality, and cost control.

overview.title: Core capabilities
overview.subtitle: Everything in one place, following the same visual system and interaction patterns as the home page.

gateway.title: Unified Gateway
gateway.subtitle: One OpenAI-compatible API that routes to 13 providers and 300+ models. Change one line of code to start.
features: OpenAI-compatible API -- drop-in replacement, same SDK, same format
13 providers: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Mistral, Groq, DeepSeek, Perplexity, Cerebras, SambaNova, Together, Fireworks, Cohere, AWS Bedrock
300+ models with automatic per-token pricing baked in
Full streaming support for all providers including Anthropic SSE translation
Vision and multimodal support (base64 or URL images)
Tool calling with cross-provider format translation

routing.title: Smart Routing
routing.subtitle: Route requests to the right model based on cost, latency, complexity, or custom rules. Automatic fallbacks when providers go down.
features: Router class with strategies: round-robin, least-cost, lowest-latency, weighted-random
Semantic routing -- classifies prompt complexity, sends simple prompts to cheap models, complex ones to powerful models
Automatic fallbacks with configurable retry chains (e.g. GPT-4o -> Claude -> Gemini)
Load balancing across model pools for high-throughput workloads
Go engine for high-performance routing with <2ms overhead

traces.title: Real-Time Traces
traces.subtitle: Every request logged with full input, output, cost, latency, model, and token counts. Query millions of traces instantly.
features: Full trace logging: input messages, output, cost, latency, model, tokens in/out
ClickHouse analytics backend -- query millions of traces in milliseconds
Real-time dashboard UI with filters, search, and trace detail view
Model-level performance stats: latency P50/P95/P99, error rates, cost per request
Export traces for offline analysis or integration with your data pipeline

costIntel.title: Cost Intelligence
costIntel.subtitle: Automatic per-token pricing for every model. See exactly where your money goes and how much smart routing saves you.
features: Automatic per-token pricing for 300+ models (continuously updated pricing database)
Cost attached to every response -- no more guessing or manual calculation
Baseline vs actual cost comparison: see what you'd pay with the most expensive model vs smart routing
Net savings calculation with monthly projections
Cost breakdown by model, by provider, by time period
Budget alerts and anomaly detection for unexpected cost spikes

quality.title: Quality Monitoring
quality.subtitle: 7 autonomous AI agents continuously scan your production traffic for issues. Catch problems before your users do.
features: Cluster Labeler -- groups prompts by domain automatically
Trace Scanner -- detects hallucinations, refusals, PII leaks, and format issues
Outlier Detector -- flags anomalous traces that deviate from normal patterns
Coherence Scorer -- rates cluster quality to ensure consistent behavior
Heuristic detection: incomplete responses, refusal phrases, latency spikes, cost anomalies
LLM-based hallucination detection with confidence scoring (0-1)

evals.title: Evaluations
evals.subtitle: LLM-as-Judge for pairwise comparison and pointwise scoring. Track quality across model updates with real metrics.
features: Pairwise comparison: model A vs B, pick the winner on your production data
Pointwise scoring: rate responses 1-5 with customizable rubrics
RouterEvaluator: benchmark routing decisions against cached responses
AUROC metrics, Pareto curves, and win rate calculations
Domain-specific evaluation with AI-suggested quality metrics
Track quality over time across model updates and routing changes

distillation.title: Model Distillation (BOND Pipeline)
distillation.subtitle: Train smaller, faster, cheaper models from your production data. Full pipeline from teacher model to deployed LoRA.
features: Pipeline: Teacher model -> LLM-as-Judge curation -> LoRA training (Unsloth) -> GGUF export
Automatic training data extraction from production traces
Preference pair generation for DPO/RLHF alignment
Golden dataset augmentation for evaluation benchmarks
Own your models -- no vendor lock-in, deploy anywhere
Eval Generator creates evaluation datasets from real production data

clustering.title: Prompt Clustering
clustering.subtitle: Automatic domain discovery from your production traffic. Understand what your users actually ask and how each domain performs.
features: Automatic domain discovery from production traffic patterns
KMeans + learned map clustering for grouping similar prompts
Embedding-based similarity using sentence transformers
Per-cluster quality metrics and cost analysis
Drift detection when traffic patterns change unexpectedly
Merge Checker suggests cluster consolidation to reduce noise

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.subtitle: Full stack with Docker. Self-host with MIT license or use the managed cloud. Production-ready from day one.
features: Full stack Docker deployment: ClickHouse + Go engine + Python API + React UI
Self-host option with MIT license -- your data stays on your infrastructure
Go engine for high-performance routing (<2ms overhead per request)
Python SDK: pip install opentracy
OpenAI SDK drop-in: just change base_url to your OpenTracy instance

meta.title: Enterprise - OpenTracy
meta.description: Your AI Lab for your enterprise. Custom Environment RL and self-improving agents, built to cut costs inside your infrastructure.

hero.subtitle: Custom Environment Reinforcement Learning and Self-Improving Agents — built to cut costs and run inside your own infrastructure.

capabilities.title: Two systems. One compounding advantage.
capabilities.subtitle: Environment RL and self-improving agents work together — each cycle makes your models more accurate, faster, and cheaper.

rl.title: AI that learns from your operation.
rl.desc: RL loops trained on your real production data — not simulations. Pricing, scheduling, routing, allocation — agents that compound value every shift and outperform generic models.
outcomes: Decisions trained on real outcomes, not simulations

envDesign.title: Built around your business logic.
envDesign.desc: Custom simulation environments modeled on your real systems — pricing engines, scheduling layers, allocation pipelines. The agent trains inside your actual operating constraints, not toy problems.

rewardEng.title: Optimizes your actual KPIs.
rewardEng.desc: Reward functions aligned with what your business cares about — margin, throughput, latency, accuracy. Not generic benchmarks. Every episode drives toward outcomes that compound on the production floor.

agents.title: Agents that get smarter every week.
agents.desc: Most AI agents stop improving on Day 1. Ours don't. They learn from your production traffic, specialize on your workflows, and replace expensive frontier calls — automatically.
outcomes: More accurate every week, no retraining ops
Up to 40× cheaper per call after distillation
Zero code changes — the agent just gets better

distillation.desc: Student models trained on your production traces replace expensive frontier API calls — automatically. Costs drop continuously as the model specializes on your traffic.

zeroRetrain.title: The improvement loop runs itself.
zeroRetrain.desc: The feedback cycle operates continuously on your production traffic. No MLOps team, no manual triggers. The agent specializes — and your cost structure follows.
bullets: Zero code changes — the agent just gets better
Compounds on your traffic, not general benchmarks

infrastructure.title: Your data. Your models. Your servers.
infrastructure.subtitle: A full AI stack deployed inside your perimeter — gateway, traces, training, serving. Compliance-ready. Open-source. No data leaves your environment.

bigCard.title: Your data never leaves your environment.
bigCard.desc: A complete AI stack — gateway, tracing, training, serving — deployed inside your own infrastructure. On-premise, private cloud, or air-gapped. No outbound data, ever.

features.title: On-premise or private cloud
features.desc: Deploy to AWS, GCP, Azure, or bare metal. You choose where the stack lives.

features.title: Air-gapped available
features.desc: For regulated environments with strict network isolation. No outbound traffic.

features.title: Open-source, MIT license
features.desc: Full codebase visibility. Fork it, audit it, extend it. No lock-in.

features.title: LGPD · GDPR · HIPAA · SOC 2
features.desc: Pre-built compliance postures for each framework. Your team stays in control.
